headline: You're 1382 days behind—discipline today, momentum tomorrow
summary: You're losing at -0.15 kg/week but need -0.60 kg/week; today demands strict Huel portions and 40 minutes of rowing to reset pace.
details: Replace any emotional snacking urges TODAY with pre-portioned Huel meals—no discretionary eating. Commit to 40 minutes on the rowing machine TODAY to create the deficit you're currently missing. You have 384 days to lose 33 kg; slipping today means 1383 days behind tomorrow—reset starts now.
